name: s3-clickhouse
description: Read S3 files into ClickHouse using table functions

auth_method.title: Authentication method
auth_method.description: Choose how to authenticate to S3
x-enum-descriptions: No credentials needed; the data is publicly accessible.

aws_access_key_id.title: Access Key ID
aws_access_key_id.description: AWS access key ID for the bucket

aws_secret_access_key.title: Secret Access Key
aws_secret_access_key.description: AWS secret access key for the bucket

path.title: S3 URI
path.description: Path to your S3 bucket or prefix

errorMessage.pattern: Must be an S3 URI (e.g. s3://bucket/path or https://bucket.s3.amazonaws.com/path)

files.name: model
files.code_template:
# Model YAML
# Reference documentation: https://docs.rilldata.com/reference/project-files/models
type: model
materialize: true
connector: clickhouse
sql: |[[ if eq .auth_method "access_key" ]]
  SELECT * FROM s3(
      '[[ s3ToHTTPS .path ]]',
      '[[ propVal .props "aws_access_key_id" ]]',
      '[[ propVal .props "aws_secret_access_key" ]]'
  )[[ else ]]
  SELECT * FROM s3('[[ s3ToHTTPS .path ]]')[[ end ]]
